text: does it have like Mario or what good games for older kids. I think this good for my 3 and 4 yr old but idk about my 8 yr old.
text_zh: 有没有像马里奥那样的，适合大孩子玩的好游戏。我觉得这个适合我 3 岁和 4 岁的孩子，但不知道我 8 岁的孩子行不行。

text: Thank you for this. I was worried about the camera.
text_zh: 谢谢你这个。我本来还担心摄像头的问题。

text: I love it because you don’t have to hold onto a console while you playing. I can’t wait to my daughter always for Christmas cause I’m ready to play with her.
text_zh: 我喜欢它，因为玩的时候不用拿着主机。我迫不及待地想在我女儿圣诞节收到的时候和她一起玩。

text: Do you need a lot of space to use it?!
text_zh: 需要很多空间才能用吗？！

text: We just got this for Christmas and we’ve all used it already! 😂 I love it so far!!
text_zh: 我们圣诞节刚买了，全家人都用过了！😂 目前很喜欢！！

text: I've been debating this for awhile for a joint gift for my 3... you sold me! 😁
text_zh: 我纠结了好久了，想给我的三个孩子当个联合礼物……你成功说服我了！😁

text: So is there only 50 games total to choose from? I was thinking it would be more for the subscription
text_zh: 所以总共只能选 50 款游戏吗？我还以为订阅会包含更多呢

text: I'm sold I already was sold as a gamer fam and with winters I can't get the kids out and about it rains al the time were 8 live saw this and was so happy cuz it will help keep them moving
text_zh: 我被说服了，我本来就已经是游戏迷了，而且冬天的时候孩子没法出去玩，我们那里总是下雨，我看到这个就太高兴了，因为它能让孩子们动起来

text: THANK YOU for this!! 💗
text_zh: 太感谢你了！！💗

text: The fact that you can’t download specific games and have to pay an ongoing subscription is what turned me off to the idea. Everyone and their subscriptions are such a scam.
text_zh: 不能下载特定游戏，而且必须持续付费订阅，这让我打消了这个念头。每个人都有他们的订阅，这简直是骗局。

text: Ima just buy my daughter a Nintendo Wii
text_zh: 我还是给我女儿买个任天堂Wii吧

text: Everyone complaint about the subscription fee — go ahead and buy a $500+ gaming console, $80 for each controller, and $60-$80+ each game they want after 😒
text_zh: 大家都抱怨订阅费——你们倒是去买个 500 美元以上的游戏机，每个手柄 80 美元，然后想玩的游戏每个都得 60-80 美元以上 😒

text: I personally love the idea of the subscription more games get added that you don’t have to buy and you never waste money on ONE game that eventually they stop playing! I have a 9yo, 6yo, and an 8mo old that’ll age into it getting years of use! Can’t wait to gift this to them for Christmas!
text_zh: 我个人很喜欢订阅的想法，可以添加更多游戏，不用单独购买，而且永远不会浪费钱买一个孩子玩腻了的游戏！我有一个9岁、6岁和8个月大的孩子，他长大后可以使用很多年！迫不及待想在圣诞节送给他们！

text: what i wanna know is what happens when my kid gets tired of playing the same games over and over? does it come out with new games?
text_zh: 我想知道的是，如果我的孩子玩腻了同样的游戏，会怎么样？它会更新游戏吗？

text: My kids love the Nex Playground
text_zh: 我的孩子们超爱 Nex Playground

text: This is the first I’ve heard about this requiring a subscription. The device should be way more affordable given you have to pay forever to use it.😕
text_zh: 这是我第一次听说这个需要订阅。考虑到你必须一直付费才能使用，这个设备应该更便宜点才对。😕

text: I appreciate you making this list 😍😍😍 thank you so much!
text_zh: 我很高兴你做了这个列表 😍😍😍 非常感谢！

text: do you get to choose the 5 free games?
text_zh: 5个免费游戏可以自己选吗？

text: I got it for 166! She is going to love this 😭
text_zh: 我花 166 块买的！她肯定会喜欢的 😭

text: But if I buy a game I have it for life subscription takes everything away completely when you stop the subscription
text_zh: 但如果我买游戏，我永远拥有它，订阅会完全拿走一切，当你停止订阅的时候。

text: $80 a year is actually so affordable. Xbox has the Xbox live fee plus $50-$80 games and it's ridiculous.
text_zh: 一年 80 美元真的太划算了。Xbox 的 Xbox Live 加上 50-80 美元的游戏，太离谱了。

text:
Thank you for this! Can you pay monthly? or just once for the whole year?
I hear they released new games each month!
Im about to buy it so we can work out
text_zh:
谢谢你发了这个！可以按月付吗？还是说一年一次买断？
我听说他们每个月都会发布新游戏！
我准备买了，这样我们就可以一起锻炼了

text: Thank you for this video!!! I also didn’t think the subscription was too bad compared to how much individual games are. Guess I’ll get it🙄😂
text_zh: 谢谢你的视频！！！我也觉得订阅费用不算太贵，跟单独买游戏比起来。看来我还是要买了🙄😂

text: Perfect timing with this video. Thank you
text_zh: 这个视频来得真及时。谢谢

text: I’ve been influenced
text_zh: 我被种草了

text: We are contemplating getting one and I would love to see it what it all looks like when on if you can show it 🙂
text_zh: 我们正在考虑买一个，我希望能看看它在游戏时实际的样子，如果你能展示一下就好了 🙂

text: This is the most informative video I’ve seen about the nex. Thank you!!!!
text_zh: 这是我见过的关于 Nex 最有信息量的视频了。谢谢你！！！！

text: I’d recommend 100/10!!! My kids love it!!
text_zh: 我100/10推荐！！！我的孩子们很喜欢！！

text: Thank you for making this video. I’ve been looking at this for awhile, we don’t do game electronics been down that road with our older kids, but I like how active this one. And you answered all the questions.
text_zh: 谢谢你拍这个视频。我看了好久了，我们家以前玩过游戏电子产品，对我们大孩子来说有点腻了，但我喜欢这个游戏的多动性。而且你回答了所有问题。

text: Is it multiplayer or just one kid at a time
text_zh: 是多人玩的还是只能一个人玩？

text: Can you travel with this? It just needs WiFi?
text_zh: 这个可以带出门旅行吗？只需要Wi-Fi就行？

text: where do you buy the Sub from
text_zh: 订阅在哪里买？

text: Thanks for the review I truly needed this info you answered so many of my questions
text_zh: 谢谢你的评测，我真的需要这些信息，你回答了我很多问题

text: So like a Wii
text_zh: 所以跟Wii一样？

text: I’m coming back to your video to buy this for Christmas. Sold sold sold 🤪
text_zh: 我要回来买这个作为圣诞礼物了。卖疯了卖疯了 🤪

text: Was going to buy it but not paying $200-$250 for a console to only have access to games via subscription.
text_zh: 本来打算买的，但又不想花200-250美元买个主机，结果只能通过订阅来玩游戏。

text: Love this! Thank you
text_zh: 太喜欢了！谢谢

text: what games come on it though? any or do you have to have the subscription?
text_zh: 上面都有什么游戏呢？有吗，还是要订阅？

text: Thanks for this review! This is the exact explanation I needed, and I’m sold lol
text_zh: 感谢这个评测！这正是我需要的解释，我被说服了 lol

text: Does it have a 2 players setting?
text_zh: 有双人模式吗？

text: Ooooh I needed this! It’s on my daughters Xmas list
text_zh: 哦哦哦！我需要这个！在我女儿的圣诞愿望清单上

text: Thank you!! I’ve been eyeing this for Christmas! This was SO helpful
text_zh: 谢谢！！我一直在盯着它作为圣诞礼物！这个太有用了

text: I got the year subscription and honestly with 6 kids thats not bad at all! something new and fun for them!
text_zh: 我买了年费订阅，说实话，有 6 个孩子，这价格一点不贵！给他们找点新东西玩！

text: Thank you for this! I needed this to convince my husband!
text_zh: 谢谢你分享这个！我需要这个来说服我老公！

text: This was SUPER helpful! I have been looking at it for awhile now and you just helped me make my decision!
text_zh: 这个太有用了！我看了好久了，你帮我做决定了！

text: Dang wish I saw this before Black Friday :(
text_zh: 该死，希望我在黑色星期五之前看到这个：(

text_zh: 问题是我儿子8岁，喜欢玩游戏，喜欢运动，不知道这个适合他这个年纪吗，还是我应该给他弄点别的？

text: Thank youuuuuuuu!!!
text_zh: 谢谢你！！！！

text: okay, so 40 games, do they change or always stay the same?
text_zh: 好吧，那40个游戏是固定的还是会变？

text: so do games leave the library?
text_zh: 那游戏会从库里下架吗？

text: Thank you for this video it’s the most informative one I’ve found!!!! Could it be set on the floor when playing? We are getting a frame tv and mounting it to the wall and will have nothing under it to set the console on so I’m concerned about where we’d put it when using
text_zh: 谢谢你的视频，这是我找到的最有用的视频了！！！！能把它放在地上玩吗？我们要买一个壁挂电视，把它挂在墙上，下面什么都没有，没地方放主机。所以我想知道用的时候我们该把它放哪。

text: Thank you so much I have this in my cart but was terrified to purchase because I was worried bc of the price. This is a perfect break down of everything !!!!
text_zh: 太感谢了！我把它放购物车里了，但因为价格犹豫不敢买。这下对一切都清楚了！！！！

text: Girl thank you for this! ✨
text_zh: 姐妹，谢谢你分享这个！✨

text: Is it easily transportable? Like if I wanted to bring it to their grandparents for the weekend or something?
text_zh: 方便携带吗？比如我想周末带去爷爷奶奶家什么的？

text: The begging to sit down got me ! I’ll be buying this for Christmas this year 😭😭😭
text_zh: 求你坐下的那个请求戳到我了！今年圣诞节我一定要买这个 😭😭😭

text: What about multiple players? Can 2 kids play at the same time?
text_zh: 那多人模式呢？能让两个孩子同时玩吗？

text: is the subscription included with the original purchase price for any amount of time? or do you purchase for 250 and then immediately have to pay additionally for the subscription?
text_zh: 订阅是包含在最初购买价格中的，还是有时间限制？或者你花 250 买了之后，马上又要另外付费订阅？

text: Their listing says comes with 5 free starter games. Are those included without the subscription?
text_zh: 他们列表上说送5个免费的入门游戏，这些游戏是不是不用订阅就包含的？

text: your totally right. I want one for myself 😂 I have no kids.
text_zh: 你完全说对了。我也想要一个😂我没孩子。

text: This was great info for the Nex playground. Thank you
text_zh: 这是关于 Nex playground 的很棒的信息。谢谢您

text: Are there only ever 40 games? Like when they add one, they remove one? Or does the number increase as they add?
text_zh: 是不是永远只有 40 个游戏？比如每加一个，就移除一个？还是说加的时候数量会增加？

text: I think it’s great. The subscription is great bc you get $50 games unlimited play. We pay more for our ebook subscriptions along with tv apps.
text_zh: 我觉得挺好的。订阅很划算，因为花50美元就能无限畅玩游戏。我们花在电子书订阅和电视App上的钱更多。

text: Can the Camera be hacked?!
text_zh: 摄像头会被黑吗？！

text: Do you think it would be good for 3&4 yo’s?
text_zh: 觉得这个适合3-4岁的孩子吗？

text: This was such a great review and answered so many of my questions, thank you for posting!✨
text_zh: 这个评测太棒了，解答了我好多疑问，谢谢博主！✨

text: Will a 10 yr old like this if he’s always on a tablet and playing Roblox? Or is it more for little ones?
text_zh: 一个 10 岁的孩子，如果他总是玩平板电脑和 Roblox，会喜欢这个吗？还是更适合小一点的孩子？

text: It’s AI. 😭
text_zh: 这是AI。😭

text: You still have to pay a yearly fee for online play with PlayStation or Xbox
text_zh: 玩PlayStation或Xbox还是得付每年的在线会员费

text: Target has it for $199 atm
text_zh: Target 现在卖199美元

text: Exactly the video I was looking for, thank you!!
text_zh: 这正是我想要的视频，谢谢你！！

text: do they have movement for seniors???
text_zh: 有没有适合老年人的运动模式？？

text: 4 games? That’s it?
text_zh: 才 4 个游戏？就这些？

text: Tiring perfeft my son needs
text_zh: 累人，完美，我儿子需要

text: I’m so glad you put it into perspective!
text_zh: 太好了，你把事情说清楚了！

text: This was the best review I’ve seen yet. 👏
text_zh: 这是我看过的最好的测评了。 👏

text: thank you I needed this video
text_zh: 谢谢，我需要这个视频

text: I’ve been a Nex user since they started. I’m normally anti subscriptions too. But honestly, the subscription with Nex is AMAZING. They put out so many games during the year. I’m so impressed with their development team.
text_zh: 我从 Nex 刚开始就一直在用。我通常也反对订阅服务。但说实话，Nex 的订阅服务太棒了。他们一年会出很多游戏。我对他们的开发团队印象深刻。

text: They literally could’ve just kept Xbox connect. I am so upset right now because I used to love that thing oh my Lord and you got both you got the consult that did everything, and you got a fun active interactive way to play games as well. Oh, and Microsoft Xbox has a subscription thing that access to over 40 games.
text_zh: 他们简直可以直接保留Xbox Kinect。我现在太难过了，因为我曾经太喜欢那个东西了，我的老天爷，你可以同时拥有主机和那种有趣的、活跃的、互动式的游戏方式。哦，而且微软Xbox还有一个订阅服务，可以玩40多款游戏。

text: Best explanation video thank you ❤
text_zh: 最棒的解释视频，谢谢你 ❤

text: God bless you hon
text_zh: 上帝保佑你，亲爱的

text: I hate that people keep comparing this to Xbox and PlayStation like it is clearly not a competitor
text_zh: 我讨厌人们一直把它和 Xbox 和 PlayStation 比较，这根本不是一个竞争对手

text: What ???? You have to subscribe in order to keep the extra games ???
text_zh: 什么？？你得订阅才能玩更多的游戏？？

text: Thank u for this!!
text_zh: 谢谢你这个！！

text: I bought one second hand and everytime i try to get it to do 2 player it cuts to a static screen and doesnt do anything… i’m sure the hdmi and charger aren’t original but wondering if that would cause it to not work properly
text_zh: 我淘了一个二手的，每次想玩双人模式的时候，屏幕就变成雪花点，什么反应都没有了…我确定HDMI线和充电器都不是原装的，不知道这会不会导致它不能正常工作

text: Thank you for this break down! My kids asked for one this year for Christmas and I had no clue what it was 😂
text_zh: 感谢你的详细介绍！我的孩子们今年圣诞节问我要这个，我完全不知道是什么😂

text: My kids are 3, 7 and 9. We got it last year for Christmas with the subscription for the year. Totally worth it! They all love it and even my 3 year old can do the preschool games. There’s always new games added too! We love it!
text_zh: 我的孩子们分别是3岁、7岁和9岁。我们去年圣诞节时买的，还包含了一年的订阅。非常值！他们都喜欢，就连我3岁的孩子也能玩里面的学龄前游戏。而且总有新游戏添加！我们太喜欢了！

text: The physical activity is not a con
text_zh: 体育活动不是缺点

text: How do you cancel the auto subscription?
text_zh: 怎么取消自动续费？

text: This was too perfect 😂 I want to get it for my kid for Christmas! As a family game
text_zh: 这个太完美了 😂 我想圣诞节给我孩子买一个！当家庭游戏

text: I'm actually really interested. $80/year is not bad since they update. it's similar to keeping the company alive and supported in producing more quality games / service. my 1 or 2 steam game costs much more than that while running on a $ ouch PC (for work). we're there games that keeps an adult body moving? are the games gear towards young sprouts? thinking this is great for the 15 min mental break from work.
text_zh: 我真的很感兴趣。80美元一年不算贵，因为他们会更新。这有点像让公司保持活力并支持他们生产更多高质量的游戏/服务。我的一两个Steam游戏比这个还贵，而且还在一台（用于工作的）昂贵的电脑上运行。有没有能让一个成年人动起来的游戏？游戏是针对小豆芽们设计的吗？我觉得这个对工作15分钟休息很棒。

text: $249 is a okay price, i don’t mind paying it. The $90 subscription is what is holding us back. $338 total before tax.
text_zh: 249美元的价格还可以，我不介意付。90美元的订阅费才是让我们犹豫的。总共338美元（不含税）。

text: me and my daughter played bluey and we did keepy uppy and fruit Ninja it was so much fun and that was just a demo at Walmart I wish we lived in a bigger place or not a upper floor apartment because it's a ton of fun
text_zh: 我和我女儿在沃尔玛玩了《布鲁伊》和《弹弹球》、《水果忍者》，简直太好玩了，那只是个试玩版。真希望我们住个大点的房子，或者不是楼上的公寓，因为这真的太好玩了

text: I just bought the year subscription with the price of the nex when I bought it this year for Christmas
text_zh: 我刚买了年费订阅，价格跟今年圣诞节我买 Nex 时一样

text: a real review!!! I love that its so interactive! I feel the subscription is worth it! its cheaper then the Xbox game pass plus youre up and moving thats worth every penny!
text_zh: 一个真实的评测！！！我喜欢它互动性这么强！我觉得订阅是值得的！比Xbox Game Pass便宜，而且你还能动起来，这钱花得值！

text: Just bought this for my grandkids.
text_zh: 刚给我的孙子孙女买了。

text: Thank you for actually reviewing it!! The added input was awesome
text_zh: 谢谢你真的去评测了！！增加的输入太棒了

text: Xbox 299 bruh
text_zh: Xbox 299 哥们

text: I love this video! Thank you 😊
text_zh: 我喜欢这个视频！谢谢你 😊

text: I think it is steep but like you said, it is a game console if you see it as such! The subscription is also worth it because I have a ps5 right.. a game of cod is $50-$70 just for the game then to play online you need a subscription to play online. I’d much rather wrap it all into one subscription. I think yes it would be nice if they did release games separately eventually that would be nice but then they’d have to reduce the subscription fee so I don’t see that happening anytime soon lol
text_zh: 我觉得有点贵，但就像你说的，如果把它看作一个游戏机的话！订阅也很值，因为我有 PS5 对吧… 一款《使命召唤》游戏就要 50-70 美元，然后在线玩还需要订阅。我宁愿把这些都包到一个订阅里。我想如果他们以后能单独发布游戏当然好，但那样他们就得降低订阅费，所以我短期内不觉得会发生 lol

text: Where is your F and heart necklace from?
text_zh: 你的 F 和心形项链是哪儿买的？

text: I am starting to save to get my son one for his birthday in August… didn’t have the funds to go it for Christmas.
text_zh: 我开始攒钱给我儿子八月份的生日买一个……圣诞节的时候没钱买。

text: 10 dollars a month is actually good we spend that on dumb stuff so in my opinion not bad
text_zh: 一个月10美元其实挺好的，我们花这么多钱买不值当的东西，所以我觉得不算差

text: I bought 3! We all love it and the subscription is well worth it with all the games
text_zh: 我买了 3 个！我们都喜欢，而且订阅绝对值，游戏这么多

text: I love that it doesn’t have Internet and you never have to worry about if your kid is playing a game appropriate for them !
text_zh: 我喜欢它没有网络，你永远不用担心孩子玩的是否适合他们的游戏！

text: Thank you times 1000 for the breakdown. I literally told my 3 little ones that I was going to look into this to see if it was worth it. If I do get it, I will definitely use your link.
text_zh: 太感谢你的详细分析了，真是帮大忙了。我跟我的三个小家伙说我要看看这个值不值。如果我买了，我一定会用你的链接。

text: BLACK FRIDAY PRICING IS LIVE!!
text_zh: 黑色星期五的特价来了！！

text: Two questions: 1. Our tv is above the mantle…would it work if we set it on the mantle or is that too high up? 2. I have a 4 year old and 2 year old. Will the 2 year old be able to play anything? Are there two person games? If just my 4 year old is playing is my 2 year old just going to get in the way and mess up his game? 😂
text_zh: 两个问题：1. 我们的电视在壁炉上方…如果我把它放在壁炉上会怎么样，会不会太高了？ 2. 我有个4岁和2岁的孩子。2岁的孩子能玩什么吗？有两人游戏吗？如果只有我4岁的孩子在玩，我2岁的孩子会不会碍事，打断他的游戏？ 😂

text: I bought one and I want to take it out of the box to try it
text_zh: 我买了一个，想拿出来试试

text: Rocky
text_zh: 洛基

text: Do you think an 12 year old would find multiple games on there that are age appropriate? He has younger siblings, ages 6 and 9 too. Thinking of getting this as a family gift for everyone for Christmas
text_zh: 你觉得一个 12 岁的小孩能找到适合他年龄的游戏吗？他还有个 6 岁和 9 岁的弟弟妹妹。我正考虑把它作为一份家庭圣诞礼物送给大家
